column1: # Hype ID phonetic overrides for id-ID system TTS.
# Lines beginning with # are ignored. Empty lines skipped.
# ─── English abbreviations heard as Indonesian letters ───────────────────
# ─── K-pop names commonly mentioned in Indonesian press ─────────────────
# ─── K-pop group + artist names (Indonesian press conventions) ──────────
# names that the engine would otherwise mangle.
# CSV format note: a phonetic with a comma must be wrapped in "" — none here.
# ─── K-pop Demon Hunters + K-culture terms (Indonesian TTS) ─────────────
# ─── Korean cultural / heritage terms — force syllable boundaries so the
#     id-ID engine reads each consonant cluster cleanly rather than as a
#     mangled English word (e.g. "Arirang" was reading strangely in ID). ─────
# ─── Korean place names commonly mentioned in K-pop news ────────────────
